title: nestlera biennis
intro: Nestlera biennis, also known as common evening primrose, is a plant species belonging to the family Onagraceae. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The seeds of the plant contain gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a fatty acid with numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Nestlera biennis include capsules, oils, and teas, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
